message:
feat(combinator): harden pipeline_with_final validation and add comprehensive pipeline tests

Two improvements to the pipeline combinator:

1. pipeline_with_final() now asserts that total_stages > 0 and that
   intermediate_outcomes.len() + 1 == total_stages, catching mismatched
   stage counts at the call site rather than silently producing wrong
   StageInfo indices.

2. The pipeline! macro body is replaced with compile_error!() to produce
   a clear compile-time message directing users to pipeline_n_outcomes or
   pipeline_with_final, instead of silently discarding all arguments via
   `let _ = ...` which gave the false impression the macro worked.

Added 13 new tests covering:
- pipeline_n_outcomes: all-ok, first-error, mid-cancel, partial
  completion, single-ok, single-error, mid-panic, empty-outcomes panic,
  too-many-outcomes panic
- pipeline_with_final: zero-stages panic, mismatched-stages panic,
  cancelled-final, panicked-final, single-stage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
